title: Battle of Birgis
content:

{{Quote|Your next task is to secure a landing zone for us at Birgis. Here's the reconnaissance data we've just received, in a format that you can use. We could simply destroy the surface from orbit, because the planet will be reshaped and reengineered to our requirements anyway, but we wish to take the inhabitants alive to work for us.|Yuuzhan Vong executor Nom Anor tasks Boba Fett with his next mission|<ref name="Fett" />}}
A '''battle''' at the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Birgis]] occurred one [[Standard week/Legends|week]] into the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]]. During the battle, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] used the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protector]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] under [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to neutralize the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on Birgis while the Yuuzhan Vong dealt with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|forces]]. The defenses were wiped out and the Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] occupied the planet. During the battle, Fett was able to recruit a [[Unidentified pilot (Birgis)|pilot]] to ferry intelligence to the nearest New Republic command, but the information carried by the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] was not acted upon.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|As long as we work for you, you leave the Mandalore sector alone.|Boba Fett, to Nom Anor|<ref name="Fett" />}}
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]],<ref name="Atlas" /> the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|fleet]] appeared in known [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. At a rendezvous in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] between [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protector]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and the Yuuzhan Vong [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|executor]] [[Nom Anor]], Anor outlined his [[Species/Legends|species']] plans for their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In return for the Yuuzhan Vong sparing the [[Mandalore sector/Legends|Mandalore sector]] during the invasion, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] would serve them.<ref name="Fett" />

On their first mission for the invaders, five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the rendezvous, Fett and the Protectors were to create a diversion at a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Birgis]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] the Yuuzhan Vong were planning to invade, with a view to [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] it and taking the population as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. Agreeing to Anor's terms, but mindful of the threat the Yuuzhan Vong posed to his people and the rest of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] Fett was already formulating plans to inform the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] of the Yuuzhan Vong's stratagems.<ref name="Fett" />

==The battle==
{{Quote|Mandos. You're fighting for those ''things''? You filthy—|A New Republic pilot calls out Fett and his comrades on Birgis|<ref name="Fett" />}}
[[File:Mandalorians_led_by_Boba_Fett.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Fett fought with his Mandalorian Protectors during the fighting on Birgis.]]
A [[Standard week/Legends|week]]<ref name="Fett" /> after the [[Battle of Helska IV|opening battle]] of the Yuuzhan Vong War at<ref name="VP">''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''</ref> the Outer Rim world<ref name="Atlas" /> of [[Helska IV]],<ref name="Fett" /> and shortly after the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Seline|attack]] on the [[Seline system/Legends|Seline system]],<ref name="Atlas" /> Fett's forces commenced their operation on Birgis. Cognizant of the fact that the defenders on Birgis had sent out early warning craft and detected the Yuuzhan Vong advance, Fett and the Protectors set about distracting the spaceport's [[anti-aircraft gun]], destroying the [[Control tower/Legends|control tower]], and generally causing enough disruption to allow the Yuuzhan Vong to effect a [[Ground warfare/Legends|ground assault]].<ref name="Fett" />

Fett's [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]], [[Goran Beviin]], encountered a [[Unidentified pilot (Birgis)|pilot]] inside the facility and, along with fellow Mandalorians [[Briika Jeban]] and her daughter [[Dinua Jeban|Dinua]], managed to restrain her. Fett entrusted the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with vital intelligence to be ferried to the nearest New Republic command, and Mandalorian [[Cham Detta]] was chosen to escort her safely off-planet; while Beviin was quietly optimistic that [[New Holgha]], a future Yuuzhan Vong target world, would be evacuated as a result, Fett was less certain.<ref name="Fett" />

Detta was ordered to get the pilot to an operable [[Starship/Legends|ship]] nearby. Meanwhile, the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|local conglomeration]] of New Republic [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] elements, comprised largely of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and ground forces—including catering [[Corps/Legends|corps]]—from conquered worlds along the invasion corridor, prepared to mount a defense from behind a barrier of wrecked [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] and [[Speeder truck/Legends|repulsortrucks]] with a motley variety of weapons. As the Yuuzhan Vong [[Warrior caste|warriors]] closed in, Fett's team withdrew. However, Beviin was curious as to how the Republic defenders had fared and discovered that they had been completely slaughtered.<ref name="Fett" /> Birgis resultantly became part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]].<ref name="Atlas" />

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|I'll find a better way to convince them. I'm not giving up on the barves yet…|Boba Fett vows to prove his worth to the New Republic on New Holgha|<ref name="Fett" />}}
After the conquest of Birgis, the main part of the Yuuzhan Vong fleet continued to invade worlds further along the [[Veragi Trade Route/Legends|Veragi Trade Route]]; the [[Mission to Bimmiel|next]] being [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]]. However, some Yuuzhan Vong forces broke off to [[Attack on the Ord Janon system|conquer]] [[Ord Janon]].<ref name="Atlas" /> The intelligence dispatched by Fett to the New Republic was discredited, and the world of New Holgha consequently [[Battle of New Holgha|fell]] to the Yuuzhan Vong with little resistance as New Republic forces had been diverted elsewhere.<ref name="Fett" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle on Birgis first appeared in the [[eBook]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'', released in [[2006]] and written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="Fett" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{1st}}
